description_long: This object is a vintage desktop computer setup featuring a CRT monitor, a beige tower case, and a matching keyboard. The monitor has a thick, square bezel with a slightly recessed glass screen displaying a blue desktop interface. The rear of the monitor is bulky with prominent ventilation grilles, and the tower case includes multiple drive bays and a power button on the front. The keyboard is rectangular with evenly spaced keys and sits directly in front of the monitor. Cables connect the monitor and tower, visible from the rear view. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a uniform beige color typical of late 20th-century office equipment.
description: A vintage beige CRT computer monitor with a thick bezel, paired with a matching tower and keyboard. The setup is boxy and utilitarian, with visible ventilation and connection cables.
description_view_0: Front view showing the CRT monitor's thick bezel, glass screen with a blue desktop interface, and the full keyboard in front of the tower case.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the monitor's deep, curved back and the keyboard's slim profile; the tower case is partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the monitor's large ventilation grilles, the back of the tower case with visible ports and cables, and the monitor's stand.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the monitor's rounded back, the keyboard's position, and the side of the tower case.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, flat, and rectangular with sharp corners, made of matte beige plastic. It has a utilitarian, retro appearance with no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The monitor is supported by a wide, rectangular pedestal base made of black plastic, providing stable support without visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A small group of buttons is visible on the lower right front edge of the monitor bezel, arranged horizontally.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, square brand logo is present on the upper left corner of the front bezel, featuring a green accent.
